div.p: CLOCK_MONOTONIC invariant Never jumps backward (NTP-safe). CLOCK_REALTIME can step backward → corrupts diff → wrong timeouts.
Return value contract -1 → epoll_wait blocks forever 0 → epoll_wait polls (returns instantly) n → epoll_wait blocks at most n ms Passed directly: epoll_wait(epfd, ev, MAX, timeout_ms)

text.tspan: blocks 4800 ms ◄── client data arrives early
